jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Indraprastha Apollo
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Indraprastha Apollo. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Radiologist to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About Indraprastha Apollo:
Indraprastha Apollo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indraprastha Apollo!
